- build(deps): bump github.com/sigstore/sigstore from 1.10.4 to 1.10.5 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​452](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/452)
- build(deps): bump github.com/google/go-containerregistry from 0.21.3 to 0.21.4 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​453](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/453)
- build(deps): bump github.com/google/go-containerregistry from 0.21.4 to 0.21.5 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​454](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/454)

- build(deps): bump github.com/google/go-containerregistry from 0.21.5 to 0.21.6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​456](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/456)
- build(deps): bump github.com/sigstore/sigstore from 1.10.6 to 1.10.8 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​457](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/457)
- chore: bump `golangci-lint` to v2.12 by [@​tri-adam](https://redirect.github.com/tri-adam) in [#​458](https://redirect.github.com/sylabs/sif/pull/458)
